<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Encoding; use DateTimeImmutable; use Lcobucci\JWT\ClaimsFormatter; use Lcobucci\JWT\Token\RegisteredClaims; use function array_key_exists; final class MicrosecondBasedDateConversion implements ClaimsFormatter { /** @inheritdoc */ public function formatClaims(array $claims): array { foreach (RegisteredClaims::DATE_CLAIMS as $claim) { if (! array_key_exists($claim, $claims)) { continue; } $claims[$claim] = $this->convertDate($claims[$claim]); } return $claims; } private function convertDate(DateTimeImmutable $date): int|float { if ($date->format('u') === '000000') { return (int) $date->format('U'); } return (float) $date->format('U.u'); } }
